title: Now
description: This is a 'now page' - a snapshot of what I'm currently focused on in life and work.

work.title: Work
work.description: Currently working as a Front-end Developer at CI&T, building scalable web applications with React and TypeScript. Focused on creating amazing user experiences and mentoring junior developers.

learning.title: Learning
learning.item1: Deepening my knowledge in System Design and Architecture
learning.item2: Exploring AI/ML integration in web applications

reading.title: Reading
reading.description: Currently reading 'The Pragmatic Programmer' for the second time. Also going through some articles about Web Performance optimization.

projects.title: Side Projects
projects.description: Working on improving my portfolio and blog. Experimenting with new technologies and building small tools that solve my daily problems.

life.title: Life
life.description: Living in Maringá, Brazil. Enjoying time with family, learning to play guitar, and trying to maintain a healthy work-life balance.
